metadata.description: SDSS DR8 Bisous filament candidates for cosmic filament weak-lensing validation
metadata.selection_base: L >= 15 Mpc/h, 0.1 <= z <= 0.2, angular_sep >= 0.5 deg, ngal >= 10 both endpoints

tiers.A_primary: L>=15, ngal>=15, z in [0.1,0.2], ang_sep>=0.5, both endpoints in KiDS-North
tiers.B_relaxed: L>=15, ngal>=10 (not 15), z in [0.1,0.2], ang_sep>=0.5, both endpoints in KiDS-North
tiers.C_allsky: L>=15, ngal>=15, z in [0.1,0.2], ang_sep>=0.5, outside KiDS-North
tiers.D_allsky_relaxed: L>=15, ngal>=10 (not 15), z in [0.1,0.2], ang_sep>=0.5, outside KiDS-North
